title: nyc-commons — Address
description: A NYC street address, decomposed the way city datasets actually store it (house number + street + borough + ZIP, often with a low/high house-number range). Twelve domains declare a private Address/PostalAddress; this is the shared shape. Pairs with geography.json (which locates the address in districts) and identifiers.json (BBL/BIN that the address resolves to via DCP's geocoder).

Address.description: A NYC street address as decomposed across agency extracts.

lowHouseNumber.description: Low end of a house-number range (HPD, DOB multi-address lots).

highHouseNumber.description: High end of a house-number range.

Address.$comment: Open (additionalProperties) — agencies decompose addresses many ways (line1/line2, street1/street2, oneLine, aptSuite, buildingNumber). The named properties are the canonical set; extras are permitted so a domain never loses a documented field by adopting this definition.
